name: codex-usage-viewer
description: Terminal usage overview and heatmap for local Codex token usage.

interface.shortDescription: Show local Codex usage overview and heatmap.
interface.longDescription: Render estimated cost, input, output, cached input, and a contribution-style terminal activity graph from local Codex token_count events in ~/.codex/sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-usage-viewer to show my Codex usage activity.
